rationale: The previous attempt only handled the `seq@` half of `Array<A, N>` and left the `ar: [A;N]` field unaddressed, so `det_set_equal`'s full struct-equality conjunct was unprovable. This attempt wraps the proof in `if <antecedent> { ... }` to put each ensures conjunct in scope, broadcasts `vstd::array::group_array_axioms` so `lemma_array_index` + `axiom_array_ext_equal` are usable, chains `=~=` through the shared `pre_self_.seq@.update(i as int, out)` target to lift `Seq<A>` equality up to the `Ghost<Seq<A>>` field `seq` (helper `lemma_array_set_det_seq_field_eq`), then derives pointwise `[A;N]` entry equality via the inline `Array::view() == self.seq@` definition and lifts it to `=~=` on `ar` (helper `lemma_array_ar_ext_eq`), and finally combines the two field equalities into full struct equality (helper `lemma_array_eq_from_fields`).
